info.name: Mobile Shop Backend - Public User Admin
info.description: Collection tach ro Public, Guest, User, Admin. Toan bo URL dung truc tiep http://localhost:8080. Tai khoan admin mac dinh: admin@mobileshop.local / Admin@123456.

exec: pm.test('Public list products success', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
if (data.data && data.data[0] && data.data[0].brandRef && data.data[0].brandRef._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('brandId', data.data[0].brandRef._id); }
if (data.data && data.data[0] && data.data[0].categoryRef && data.data[0].categoryRef._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('categoryId', data.data[0].categoryRef._id); }

exec: pm.test('User register success or already exists', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([201, 409]); });
if (pm.response.code === 201) { const data = pm.response.json(); if (data.token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('authToken', data.token); } }

request.description: Can token that cua Google hoac Facebook. Google dung idToken hoac accessToken. Facebook bat buoc accessToken.

exec: console.log('Cannot parse targetUserId from request body', error);

request.description: Nhap targetUserId ngay trong body de xac dinh user can doi role. Request nay dung de doi role user/admin va goi dung endpoint /api/admin/users/:id/role.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Admin Product {{$timestamp}}",
  "slug": "postman-admin-product-{{$timestamp}}",
  "image": "https://placehold.co/600x600/png?text=Postman+Admin+Product",
  "images": ["https://placehold.co/600x600/png?text=Postman+Admin+Front"],
  "imageFileData": "",
  "imagesFileData": [],
  "brand": "Postman",
  "category": "{{adminCategoryName}}",
  "categoryId": "{{adminCategoryId}}",
  "description": "San pham do admin tao de test API quan tri.",
  "price": 15990000,
  "originalPrice": 17990000,
  "countInStock": 15,
  "screen": "6.5 inch AMOLED",
  "battery": "5000mAh",
  "camera": "50MP + 8MP",
  "ram": "8GB",
  "storage": "256GB",
  "colors": ["Black", "Blue"],
  "features": ["5G", "AMOLED"],
  "tags": ["postman", "admin"],
  "specifications": { "chip": "Snapdragon 7 Gen 3", "os": "Android 15" },
  "status": "active"
}

request.description: Truong image va images ho tro ca URL anh thong thuong lan data URL base64. Co the gui them imageFileData va imagesFileData de backend tu upload len Cloudinary roi luu URL.
Nhap ID product can xem vao collection variable targetProductId.

Nhap ID product can sua vao collection variable targetProductId. Neu doi danh muc, nhap targetCategoryId dung voi category can gan. Truong image va images ho tro URL hoac data URL; imageFileData va imagesFileData duoc tu dong upload len Cloudinary.
Nhap ID product can ngung kinh doanh vao collection variable targetProductId.
